id: disable-vrm-look
title: "Disable VRM look-at functionality"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable VRM look-at functionality"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/look"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disable the look-at functionality for the specified VRM model.

  as={"h2"}
